items.title: [正面] As much as I play it I should probably give them a...
items.summary:
As much as I play it I should probably give them a recommendation. There are some annoying things starting with how this was supposedly an investigation RPG and they HAD to change to gacha monetization and change the second half of the story mechanics because it was the ONLY way to recover financially. And they are still supposedly struggling financially so while trying to remain f2p friendly as a stance do make frequent decisions that favor whales. Compared to other gachas though it is f2p friendly and the amount of fomo is low. The only more friendly one is probably CZN and that's because there's just nothing to invest in which is almost a problem in itself. I've played super casually for about 3 months and not bothered if I miss some weeklies or dailies (except realistically I haven't missed many dailies anyway as they are extremely fast) because pull income is generous. There is a borrow support feature that works in almost every possible event so even a day 1 player can use a highly whaled DPS to clear any events that are going on.

I haven't played Slay the Spire so I don't know how far they strayed from the basic gameplay - I am assuming death resistance as a stat (the ability to die and get a buff after bringing you back to life) is unique and is a sort of love it or hate it mechanic. I say that but I'm actually kind of neutral on it, however it is central to endgame gameplay and not uncommon to have dying once be guaranteed/ a part of your strategy. The 4 realms of "magic" and how they interact is a good mechanic that makes team building interesting (I don't even know if StS has teams). Morimens has reasons to build and play many teams and almost all characters so if you are the kind of person that thinks that sounds appealing you will probably love it. 

The story and art is largely non-gooner which is a plus to me, but there is still an obvious favoritism towards sexy females (especially ones blatantly without underwear on and showing a lot of upper hip which is clearly someone's favorite and may be a plus to others) mingled in with the more creative concepts. Plus a random really weird chapter with a character that is obsessed with procreating. The devs are obviously inspired by classic cosmic horror which includes Saya no Uta, duh since they had a Saya collab; so they put this Saya inspired story out of nowhere in the first part of the more serious arc where it's all of a sudden BOOBIES IN YO FACE (then later do the Saya collab itself with a nothing burger of a story). It's annoying to me but on a much lesser level of CZN turning from horror to cutesy. At least Morimens doesn't seem like they are focusing on fanservice even if it would help their bottom line while CZN doubled down on tits instead of interesting plot.

The story is fine and the translation is mediocre but passable. I think it gets praise because the text is more flowery than typical mobile game fare but it's wildly inconsistent in tone and pacing and additionally lacks a lot of context between events that occur (so I don't know maybe that's the writing rather than the translation). There are writers who can describe a lot of minute details in scenes and not make it seem pointless or redundant but the writers and/or translators of this game are not that. The cadence of sentences is predictable with incorrectly used and repetitive commas. The MC wavers between serious and anime when it's not called for. If it was a book it would be too annoying for me to get through. In smaller chunks it's tolerable but to me it is technically less well done than HSR even though HSR is written in more simple language. Some of the lore and side content like Simulated Universe in HSR is very well translated. If there is even another story arc in the future I hope they can do a better job but I guess that's also the biggest downside to Morimens.

Unfortunately there may never be another story arc. The available content might be all there ever is. So yes even though I have some criticisms I want them to make money so they can make more story chapters and also release the scrapped chapters. It is I think a niche game but it's good in that niche.

items.title: [负面] (In advance I have dyslexia so if something is mis...
items.summary:
(In advance I have dyslexia so if something is misspelled my bad.) 
This game is genuinely good story is interiging at most too. Sadly though last couple of days I haven't been able to log in for wtv reason. I've tried every thing possible from logging out, resigning in and uninstalling the game and it just doesn't wanna work. I wanted to love the game and continue playing but its not seeming to work very well. If you fix it till change the review but for now I dont suggest the game till they fix wtv this issue is.

items.title: [正面] Me agrada mucho este juego, es uno de los mejores...
items.summary: Me agrada mucho este juego, es uno de los mejores que he jugado aunque luego me ilusioné con el gacha se que asi son abecés te toca algo bueno o algo malo o simplemente nada, la historia es interesante y la musica es la mejor que he escuchado se pueden obtener recursos fácilmente además de que esta para celulares. Sin duda es un juego que recomiendo

items.title: [正面] Хорошая гача. Что-то включил и залип на весь день....
items.summary: Хорошая гача. Что-то включил и залип на весь день. Не знаю, как тут по мете и прочему, но сюжет хороший, за первый день выбил ♥♥♥♥♥ лег, теперь просто кайфовать, качаться. Спасибо разрабам, надеюсь поработают над русским языком.

items.title: [正面] Gameplay is a mix of Slay the Spire with a really...
items.summary: Gameplay is a mix of Slay the Spire with a really good cosmic horror visual novel. There is a gatcha system but the devs are very very generous with free pulls and currency even after the normal newbie stage of the game. Characters are extremely well designed. The story is really interesting. But the combat is were the real meat and potatoes are at. It's slay the spire but your deck is made up of the cards of your teams 4 members so you have control over it massively. Instead of elements like other games, each character belong to one of 4 factions and your team can be made up of up to 2 factions thou you get a bonus for pure teams. And each faction has it's own mechanic leading to a lot of build variety and experimenting with team comps ever thou I hate doing that in other games. Trust me this game is amazing!
